questions.question: The number of factors for 20 is ______.
questions.explanation: From Section 28, Column I: Number of factor of 20 is ____ (B)

questions.question: The HCF of 18 and 30 is ______.
questions.explanation: From Section 28, Column I: HCF of 18 and 30 is __________ (D)

questions.question: If 2k-1 is a prime then 2k-1(2k-1) is a ______.
questions.explanation: From Section 29, Column I: If 2k-1 is a prime then 2k-1(2k-1) is a (D)

questions.question: The value of 4!÷2! is ______.
questions.explanation: From Section 30, Column I: The value of 4!÷2! (B)

questions.question: The first microchip was invented in ______.
questions.explanation: From Microchip section, Tiny 1958 and was only a few millimeters!

questions.question: The Rubik’s Cube has ______ colored faces.
questions.explanation: From The Rubik’s Cube section, has six colored faces and 54 squares

questions.question: The world record for solving the Rubik’s Cube is under ______ seconds.
questions.explanation: From The Rubik’s Cube section, Solving it is under 4 seconds!

questions.question: Fibonacci Retracement Levels key points are based on the Golden Ratio of ______.
questions.explanation: From Stock Market Secret section, Fibonacci Retracement Levels key points based on the Golden Ratio help traders predict possible support and resistance levels in stock prices

questions.question: The first pacemaker was implanted in ______.
questions.explanation: From Pacemaker section, The first pacemaker was implanted in 1958

questions.question: The Golden Ratio is also known as the ‘Divine Proportion’ and equals to ______.
questions.explanation: From Stock Market Secret section, Some traders call 1.618 the “Divine Proportion” Tiny believing it reveals hidden market patterns!

questions.question: The number of possible combinations for the Rubik’s Cube is ______.
questions.explanation: From The Rubik’s Cube section, has six colored faces and 54 squares, with over 43 quintillion possible combinations yet only one solution

questions.question: The first microchip was a few millimeters in size and was invented in ______.
questions.explanation: From Microchip section, Tiny 1958 and was only a few millimeters!

questions.question: The Rubik’s Cube has ______ squares.
questions.explanation: From The Rubik’s Cube section, has six colored faces and 54 squares

questions.question: The world record for solving the Rubik’s Cube is under ______ seconds.
questions.explanation: From The Rubik’s Cube section, Solving it is under 4 seconds!
